name: TP-Link Kasa Smart Plug Mini (EP25)
summary: Matter-certified smart plug with energy monitoring. Perfect entry point into smart home automation.
features: Matter certified - works with Apple Home, Google Home, and Alexa
Energy monitoring to track power consumption
No hub required - connects directly to WiFi
Compact design doesn't block adjacent outlets
Voice control via Siri, Google Assistant, or Alexa

pros: Energy monitoring helps reduce electricity costs
cons: Basic features compared to premium plugs

bestFor: Anyone starting smart home journey or needing affordable, reliable smart plugs
